summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Support Ticket Helper. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend ticket analysis and gap analysis flows functioning properly. LLaMA classification, FAISS recommendations, and sensitive data anonymization all working as expected.
passed_tests: Preprocessing and anonymization (emails, phones, URLs, API keys, transaction IDs)
LLaMA classification via Groq API (category, tags, confidence scoring)
FAISS KB recommendations with similarity scores
Full ticket analysis pipeline (preprocessing + classification + recommendations)
Gap analysis with CTR metrics and low-performing article identification
Data retrieval endpoints (tickets and KB articles)
Frontend ticket input and analysis flow
Frontend gap analysis tab with metrics display
